meanings.definition: of or relating to or characteristic of tragicomedy
examples: a playwright specializing in tragicomic drama

meanings.definition: manifesting both tragic and comic aspects; - B.R.Redman
examples: the tragicomic disparity...between's man's aspirations and his accomplishments

meanings.definition: having pathetic as well as ludicrous characteristics; --Joseph Conrad
examples: her life...presented itself to me as a tragicomical adventure
